data.keyword: himalayan salt bricks for sauna wall where to purchase

result.keyword: himalayan salt bricks for sauna wall where to purchase

items.markdown:
You can purchase Himalayan salt bricks for a sauna wall from `specialized sauna suppliers, wellness retailers, and major online marketplaces` . Depending on your project, you can buy individual bricks, bulk packs for DIY installation, or pre-assembled wall panels.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Pink-Salt-Natural-Wholesale/dp/B0F7Z7BK2B#:~:text=Bulk%20200%20Himalayan%20Pink%20Salt,x%202%22%20-%20Amazon.com)[[2]](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/collections/salt-blocks#:~:text=Wholesale%20Salt%20Blocks%20and%20Bricks%20for%20Sauna%0A%0APink,designed%20for%20Salt%20therapy%20&%20decorative%20space.)[[3]](https://www.instagram.com/pinksalttiles/#:~:text=Crafted%20from%20100%25%20pure%20Himalayan%20salt%2C%20our,breath.%20%E2%9C%A8%20Build%20wellness%2C%20design%20with%20nature.)[[4]](https://www.ubuy.gy/product/F975P3HO8-himalayan-pink-salt-bricks-for-wall-salt-tiles-for-spa-sauna-diy-projects-size-8-x-4-x-1-crystal-salt-slab-pack-of-200#:~:text=Himalayan%20Pink%20Salt%20Bricks%20-%20Ideal%20for,inches%20%2820.3%20x%2010.2%20x%202.5%20cm%29)[[5]](https://havenofheat.com/blogs/sauna-guides/himalayan-salt-in-saunas#:~:text=Pre-assembled%20salt%20wall%20panels%20are%20the%20most,behind%20and%20creates%20a%20stunning%20amber%20glow.)

**Where to Purchase** 

- **Specialized Sauna & Wellness Retailers**:
	- **Build Salt Wall** : Offers extensive bulk options, such as 10-pack starter kits to 1,000-pack construction sets . They also provide specialized [Salt Wall Kits](https://buildsaltwall.com/) that include non-toxic adhesive.
	- **[Steam Sauna Supply](https://www.steamsaunasupply.com/products/scandia-himalayan-salt-wall-brick?variant=43171592175816)** : Carries individual **[Scandia Himalayan Salt Wall Bricks](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:8720843991941391542,headlineOfferDocid:1244863429113860658,productDocid:1244863429113860658&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwiJguaB-6OTAxUORjABHYRIMLUQxa4PegQIBRAG)** ($20.00 $26.00 ) in white and red, sized 6" x 8" x 1".
	- **[Scandia Manufacturing](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels?variant=51818543382759)** : Sells [Himalayan Salt Wall Panels](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels) which can be customized with or without LED backlighting, starting around $225.00.
	- **[Cedar Sense](https://cedar-sense.com/product/himalayan-salt-sauna-wall/?attribute_colors=RGB+LED&attribute_sizes=4%22+x+48%22&attribute_styles=White+Salt+Brick)** : Features architectural [Sauna Feature Panels](https://cedar-sense.com/product/himalayan-salt-wall-panels/) with professional mounting systems and LED options ($495.00–$1,195.00).
	- **Finnish Sauna Builders** : Another source for Scandia branded bricks at competitive pricing.
- **Major Online Marketplaces**:
	- **Amazon** : Good for smaller DIY quantities, such as [4-packs](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Bricks-Center-Improvement-Projects/dp/B0BPV69VHV) or [100-pack bulk sets](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Salt-Tiles-8x4x0-75-Construction/dp/B0FCPGVCJN).
	- **Etsy** : Ideal for natural, hand-cut tiles. Sellers like Natural Bricks for Sauna offer individual tiles starting at $28.00.
	- **eBay** : Often carries large bulk listings, such as a 500-pack kit with 17 units of salt-specific glue included.[[1]](https://scandiamfg.com/products/himalayan-salt-panels#:~:text=$225.00%20USD,Quantity)[[2]](https://buildsaltwall.com/#:~:text=EXPLORE%20THE%20COLLECTION-,Wholesale%20Salt%20Bricks,Regular%20price%20$2%2C600.00)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1244863429113860658&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:190732675403577257&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10815016088968878876&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15779209638848766911&ibp=oshop)[[7]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4511500638322461715&ibp=oshop)[[8]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Bricks-Center-Improvement-Projects/dp/B0BPV69VHV#:~:text=Amazon.com:%20Himalayan%20Pink%20Salt,%22%20:%20Patio%2C%20Lawn%20&%20Garden)[[9]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Salt-Tiles-8x4x0-75-Construction/dp/B0FCPGVCJN#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Tiles%208x4x0.,Sauna%20Wall%20Construction%20-%20Amazon.com)[[10]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10301862986055299171&ibp=oshop)[[11]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15628945752102994160&ibp=oshop)

**Common Specifications** 

| Product Type[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:14174910350653945314,catalogid:10994714541540528119,gpcid:6549375298000216802,mid:576462304690905009&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1199168614860107281&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10301862986055299171&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10718329638722808258&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:12359293068405219615,catalogid:10872189430815982313&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7199299572033366386&ibp=oshop) | Typical Size | Use Case |
|---|---|---|
| **Standard Brick** | 8" x 4" x 2" | Heavy-duty structural walls; best for heat retention. |
| **Slim Tile** | 8" x 4" x 1" | Standard for wall panels and decorative backlighting. |
| **Pre-built Panel** | 48" wide (var. height) | Quick installation; often includes LED lighting and mounting. |

**Installation Tips** 

- **Adhesive** : Use specialized non-toxic, water-resistant salt adhesive (like Saltite) rather than standard construction glue to ensure it handles heat and doesn't off-gas.
- **Backlighting** : For an "ethereal" glow, choose 1" tiles and install dot-less LED strips behind them.
- **Environment** : These are best for dry saunas. High humidity can cause the salt to attract moisture and potentially stain your sauna walls.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15628945752102994160&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9934999969608502729&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:12359293068405219615,catalogid:10872189430815982313&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7199299572033366386&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://buildsaltwall.com/blogs/himalayan-salt-benefits/build-your-own-himalayan-salt-bricks-panels#:~:text=Himalayan%20salt%20bricks%20panels%20are%20generally%20fine%20to%20use%20in,panels%20start%20to%20peel%20off.)

Would you like to know more about the **specific adhesive** needed for these bricks or see **pre-assembled panel** options?
